title: Ben's Sharks
description: A simplistic approach towards one of the ocean's most complex creatures.
body:
![Ben's Sharks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6075b43a967f47f82b6f5d4964c1180f02fa060b.png)
![Ben's Sharks 1.2.7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kF6ZFH7j/images/3472b75ca554971cbf6397f23dc16cb97ed5f974.png)
 ### [THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

**Ben's Sharks is a mod for both Forge and NeoForge that attempts to answer the question "What if sharks were added to Minecraft?"**



**This mod currently adds 26 New Mobs and several Noteworthy items, each with unique uses.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/598QNpciQUo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




**Install Just Enough Items (JEI) to view crafting recipes.**



Info about this mod will be provided in the Wiki (W.I.P).









**Disclaimer: Ben's Sharks does not encourage or condone with any form of Shark Hunting. It is worth noting that 1/3 of every shark species around the world is either endangered or flagged under protection. Sharks are a beautiful part of their respective ecosystems and must therefore be preserved.**

**As of version 1.2.0, the "Shark Fin" item has been completely removed, essentially eliminating any form of Shark Hunting through the use of this mod.**



**As of version 1.2.5, the "Shark Fin" item was re-added, but in the hands of the evil Illagers.**

**Don't try and kill any sharks to get this item as they don't drop it. It can only be obtained by looting Pillager Outposts and Woodland Mansions.**



This mod is a solo project solely done by me, so expect there to be a lengthy gap between updates. Stay tuned.

Click Here to get this mod in > [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bens-sharks).
